name: Nairobi Club Weiners
recipeInstructions:
1. Use beef hot dogs; "meat" ones are acceptable. Cut into 1-inch pieces and place in a crock pot.
2. Cover the hot dogs with beer, using inexpensive varieties if desired.
3. Cook for several hours until the hot dogs plump up. Drain off the beer and cover with BBQ sauce.
4. Continue cooking for a couple more hours.
This recipe is much better than it sounds and adults will enjoy it despite its spicy nature. Kids may not like it as much.
